objective: Teach MedGemma to visually identify and contextualize the Singapore-style beef hot dog with bun, ketchup, and mustard, including its product form, texture, ingredients, preparation, and typical local serving contexts.

hero_product: photorealistic Singapore beef hot dog in soft white bun with ketchup and yellow mustard
close-up of beef frankfurter hot dog with ketchup and mustard on white bun Singapore food court style
cinema style hot dog with beef sausage in bun topped with ketchup and mustard Singapore
macro_texture: texture of steamed or grilled beef frankfurter sausage surface close-up
soft white hot dog bun crumb and crust texture close-up Singapore style
glossy tomato ketchup and smooth yellow mustard on beef hot dog bun close-up
raw_ingredients_and_process: pre-cooked beef frankfurter sausage with visible spices and casing
soft white enriched wheat flour hot dog bun for Singapore style hot dog
ketchup and yellow mustard condiments squeezed on hot dog bun
grilled beef frankfurter sausage with slight charring typical of Singapore food court
in_the_wild_context: Singapore food court stall serving beef hot dogs with ketchup and mustard
cinema snack kiosk in Singapore selling beef frankfurter hot dogs in buns
shopping mall food stall in Singapore with hot dog beef frankfurter snacks
Singapore street food vendor offering beef hot dogs with condiments
culinary_application: Singapore style snack portion of one beef frankfurter hot dog with bun and condiments
hot dog served as quick protein snack in Singapore food courts and cinemas
hot dog with ketchup and mustard served as casual fast food in Singapore
label_truth: hot dog ingredient label showing beef frankfurter with nitrites and spices
nutrition label highlighting very high sodium content in beef frankfurter hot dog
processed meat product label with allergen info: gluten and possible pork in frankfurter casing
